case_title: TIPAZ, ABSOLON VS EDUARDO, REYES DBA TRANSPORTES QUATEX EXPRESS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIPAZ, ABSOLON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDUARDO, REYES DBA TRANSPORTES QUATEX EXPRESS $1,740.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,790.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,740.00 FILED BY TIPAZ, ABSOLON AS TO DEFENDANT EDUARDO, REYES DBA TRANSPORTES QUATEX EXPRESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-11-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-20-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 6/20/07 AT 10:00 A.M. FOR SERVICE ON DEFENDANT.
